summary: Comprehensive testing of Live Demo feature completed successfully. All critical functionality verified: demo opens correctly, 10x speed button accelerates simulation, play/pause works, algorithm executes 10+ trades in ~25 seconds at 10x speed (11 trades with 91% win rate and +$1838.73 P&L), session stats update correctly, Algorithm Thinking panel shows real-time decision logs, Open Position panel displays active trades with all details, and Recent Trades section shows completed trades.
passed_tests: Live Demo opens when clicking 'View Live Demo' button on homepage
10x speed button works and accelerates simulation
Play/Pause button starts and stops simulation correctly
Algorithm executes 10+ trades within ~25 seconds at 10x speed (exceeded requirement)
Trade counter in Session Stats updates correctly (11 trades achieved)
Win rate displays correctly and updates after trades (91%)
P&L display updates correctly after trades (+$1838.73)
Algorithm Thinking panel shows real-time decision logs (59 thought bubbles)
Open Position panel displays when a trade is active with Entry, Stop Loss, Take Profit, Lots, and P&L
Breakeven Set badge appears when position reaches breakeven trigger
Recent Trades section shows completed trades with trade type, close reason, P&L and R-multiple
RSI, Trend, EMA 20, EMA 50, Support, Resistance indicators all display correctly
Support/Resistance lines show on price chart
Entry line shows on chart when position is open
Market phase indicator shows current simulation phase
Close demo button works and returns to main page
seed_data_creation: N/A - uses JavaScript simulation engine for market data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Demo feature is fully functional. All 9 features requested in the test scope are working correctly. The simulation executes trades faster than the 50-60 second requirement (achieved 10+ trades in ~25 seconds at 10x speed). Key data-testid selectors: view-demo-btn, play-pause-btn, speed-10x, total-trades, win-rate, total-pnl, balance, close-demo-btn, current-price.
